name: Arjun Kumar
text: The hands-on projects and AI integration modules completely transformed my career. Got a 150% hike!

name: Priya Sharma
text: Best DevOps training in Bengaluru. The BTM Layout classroom sessions are incredibly interactive and the trainers are top-notch.

name: Rahul Verma
text: The curriculum is updated with the latest tools like LangChain and Kubernetes. Highly recommended for experienced professionals looking to upskill.

name: Sneha Reddy
text: The capstone project involving the AI-Powered Log Analyzer gave me the practical edge I needed in my interviews.
